text: I am filled with quiet curiosity in this modern, clinical space. The glass divides my inner world from the one just outside, an R+D display glowing with inviting questions. Here, knowledge is not only stored but displayed as a living process—a collective effort to probe reality. I feel as if I am on the threshold between contemplation and innovation, an observer and a participant both. The slightly skewed angles of my view echo how disorienting and exciting it is to be at the frontier of discovery.
